strengths: Proven experience in architecting and building event-driven, distributed systems with a focus on real-time data processing — directly aligns with the need for multi-agent AI frameworks handling real-time market data and logistics constraints (GISCollective, Dunnhumby media, re:cinq).

Demonstrated leadership in scaling engineering practices and tooling, including developer infrastructure and hybrid engineering models (Altom Consulting, re:cinq), supporting the CTO’s responsibility to scale a high-performance engineering organization and govern outsourced partners.

Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and tooling (re:cinq, MCP code generators) and deep technical fluency in modern backend systems, including microservices, observability, and performance optimization — critical for designing auditable, debuggable agentic AI systems in fintech.
concerns: No explicit executive-level leadership experience (e.g., VP Eng, CTO) in a venture-backed scale-up, raising questions about readiness to own full technical strategy and board-level communication.
Limited direct fintech domain experience (credit systems, payment flows, regulatory compliance) — a meaningful advantage in the role, though not a strict disqualifier.
While strong in distributed systems and tooling, resume lacks clear evidence of production experience with stateful, tool-augmented AI agents in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments.

key_factors.factor: Agentic AI and distributed systems expertise

response.justification: Bogdan Szabo presents a compelling case for advancing due to his deep technical expertise in event-driven architectures, real-time systems, and AI-agent tooling — core to the CTO’s mandate. His leadership in scaling engineering practices, developing internal tooling, and governing hybrid teams demonstrates readiness to build and lead a high-performance engineering organization. While fintech domain experience is limited, his architectural fluency and hands-on contributions to agentic infrastructure provide a strong foundation for rapid onboarding in a fintech-AI context.
